what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG shopping cart icon using a stroked cart outline and two circular wheels.
observations: SVG has xmlns, viewBox="0 0 24 24", width="24", and height="24".
The icon uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so color is inherited from context.
Stroke styling is set to width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
The cart body is drawn as a single path, and the wheels are two circle elements.
standouts: currentColor stroke makes the icon themeable from surrounding text or CSS color.
The graphic is built from one path and two wheel circles.
The path uses horizontal line commands for the cart frame and basket.
conventions: Follows common stroke-icon SVG conventions with no fill, currentColor, round caps, and round joins.
Uses a standard 24x24 icon coordinate system.
Keeps the SVG compact as a single-line asset.
concerns: No title, role, aria-label, or aria-hidden attribute is present in the standalone SVG.
notes: A compact stroke-only shop cart SVG intended for use as a reusable icon asset.
questions: Should accessibility metadata be supplied at the SVG asset level or by the component that renders it?
purpose_vs_actual: The file path/name indicates a shop-cart SVG icon, and the content depicts a shopping cart.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a lightweight shopping cart icon that can adopt the color of its rendering context.
contribution: Contributes a themeable 24x24 shopping cart icon with a simple stroke construction suitable for navigation, commerce actions, or cart-related UI affordances.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor stroke SVG shopping cart icon made from one cart path and two circular wheels.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a compact reusable cart icon that inherits styling from its UI context.
